name: shopify-draft-proxy-rust-shim
description: TypeScript shim around the Rust HTTP runtime for the top-level shopify-draft-proxy package.

scripts.build: cd .. && corepack pnpm exec tsc -p js
scripts.test: cd .. && corepack pnpm exec vitest run tests/integration/rust-public-api.test.ts tests/integration/rust-http-adapter-parity.test.ts
